after.title: Blorb!

added.title: Couples Somatic Coregulation with Tany
added.description: Explore Tao and Tantra body-based practices to deepen intimacy, presence, and nervous system attunement. Leave with hands-on tools to nurture connection with yourself and your partner long after the festival ends

removed.title: Epic Cupcakes
removed.description: Epic Cupcakes: Play “Truth or Dare Icing Breakers” + eat the most EPIC cupcake of your life.

removed.title: Epic Cupcakes
removed.description: Play “Truth or Dare Icing Breakers” + eat the most EPIC cupcake of your life.

removed.title: Brunch Bunch Bass Boogie Bash
removed.description: Brunch Bunch Bass Boogie Bash: The brunch bunch are returning with more tasty beats and delicious eats. We’ll be serving the scrumptious sounds of the Hardy Boys with a delectable brunch and mimosas to start your day off right. Saturday and Sunday!

before.title: Intro to Ropes with Fox!
before.description: Want to be tied to the train tracks? Does Shibari make you MOIST? Come learn the basics of bondage - best learned with a partner and your own rope, but we will have some to lend out.

added.title: Festival Friending: Speed Connecting & Conscious Convos
added.description: Meet inspiring humans through fun, thought-provoking connection exercises and small-group discussions. We blend music, movement and meaningful conversation to help you make new friends and deepen bonds. Minimal cringe & maximum fun! Hosted by Konscious Kitties

added.title: Placenta Pancakes Breakfast
added.description: Placenta Pancakes Breakfast: Come fuel up for the day with some delicious Placenta Pancakes in the Living Womb. Get rebirthed before noon and rock your day renewed!

added.title: Glowing Balloon Jizz Crafting and Parade Guided Parade
added.description: Glowing Balloon Jizz Crafting and Parade Guided Parade: We will help you craft your very own 3 foot long light up jizz balloon, then take a guided walk/military style ridiculous march around the festival with your lovely/demanding host Alex the Ovum. Show up @ 8:30, march leaves around 9:15.

added.title: Tea & Grounding meditation with Julia
added.description: Tea & Grounding meditation with Julia: Come sip some hibiscus or rooibos, then flop into whatever position feels like home — womb- mode encouraged. Drift into a little meditation - breathe, shift around, the occasional cheeky toot. BYO cup and pillow.

added.title: Get in der’ - Jizz Crafting and Race for Your Life
added.description: Get in der’ - Jizz Crafting and Race for Your Life: Come craft your own personalized balloon sperm or ovum at the Womb and then race it to win a chance at existence! Free rebirthing while you wait.

added.title: Most Restorative Womb yoga EVER
added.description: Most Restorative Womb yoga EVER: Come restore your body back to your fluid fetus self. Let your nervous system be held in our amniotic space. Gentle movement to gestate yourself back to feeling newer than when you were first born! Bring a yoga mat and a placenta if you have one.

added.title: Colouring in the Womb with Julia
added.description: Come colour with Julia in the womb just like the good ol’ days! Crayons and paper provided, just bring your beautifully wandering monkey mind and let it land, one color at a time.

added.title: Brunch Bunch Bass Boogie Bash
added.description: Brunch Bunch Bass Boogie Bash: The brunch bunch are returning with more tasty beats and delicious eats. We’ll be serving the scrumptious sounds of the Hardy Boys with a delectable brunch and mimosas to start your day off right. Saturday and Sunday!
